meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no portfolio and a career-ready developer. Learn to build passive income AI micro-SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Transform your 'no portfolio' status by building high-utility AI micro-SaaS tools. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you can deploy scalable, revenue-generating applications that serve as living proof of your engineering expertise, effectively bypassing traditional resume gatekeepers while building a sustainable passive income stream.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio page is the silent killer of junior developer careers. You have the technical knowledge, but the industry demands proof—not just potential. The traditional 'todo list' app won't move the needle; you need a product that lives in the wild, handles real data, and generates value.

By pivoting toward AI micro-SaaS, you stop being a student and start being a founder. We are going to build a specialized tool that solves a tangible problem, automates a task, and earns income. This isn't just a project; it's a professional asset that demonstrates you can ship, iterate, and monetize in the modern AI-first ecosystem.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a small, painful workflow for a specific professional group that can be automated via LLM APIs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current trends in micro-SaaS for freelance marketers. Identify three high-demand, low-complexity problems that can be solved by an AI-powered text transformation tool.

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a robust, production-ready project structure that includes authentication and payment integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 project structure with Tailwind CSS, Supabase for authentication, and Stripe API integration for subscription management.

steps.title: Implement the AI Core
steps.description: Integrate the Claude API to handle the logic of your tool, ensuring clean, type-safe responses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular service function in TypeScript that accepts user input, sends it to the Anthropic API with a system prompt, and handles potential rate limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'implement ai service logic using @anthropic-ai/sdk'

steps.title: Automate Deployment and Scaling
steps.description: Set up an automated CI/CD pipeline so your app is always live and ready for users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys the application to Vercel upon every push to the main branch.

steps.title: Monetization and Analytics
steps.description: Integrate Stripe and analytics to track user engagement and revenue, proving the app's viability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the logic for a Stripe webhook handler that triggers when a subscription is updated and updates the user's status in Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add stripe webhook handler for subscription lifecycle events'

pro_tips: Focus on 'Time-to-Value': The best micro-SaaS solves a 10-minute task in 10 seconds.
Use 'Build in Public': Document your hurdles on X or LinkedIn; it acts as a secondary portfolio.
Prioritize 'Stripe over Scale': Don't over-engineer for millions of users; focus on getting your first five paying customers.
The 'Hidden API' Strategy: Look for platforms with APIs that lack decent UI and build the UI wrapper.
Keep dependencies lean: Every extra library increases your maintenance burden—only add what is essential.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, shift your focus to 'distribution'. Post your tool on Product Hunt, IndieHackers, and relevant subreddits to get your first real user feedback loop started.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a builder with a live product. Stop waiting for permission to be hired and start proving your value through code that generates revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
